creator: blackend@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Sep 10, 2011 at 11:22:13AM +0000, Frederic Culot wrote:
> 
> >Number:         160617
> >Category:       docs
> >Synopsis:       New documentation: French translation for contributing-ports article
> >Confidential:   no
> >Severity:       non-critical
> >Priority:       low
> >Responsible:    freebsd-doc
> >State:          open
> >Quarter:        
> >Keywords:       
> >Date-Required:
> >Class:          change-request
> >Submitter-Id:   current-users

> >Closed-Date:
> >Last-Modified:
> >Originator:     Frederic Culot
> >Release:        FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE i386
> >Organization:

> System: FreeBSD freefall.freebsd.org 8.2-STABLE FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE #4 r220774: Mon Apr 18 13:56:14 UTC 2011 simon@freefall.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/FREEFALL i386
> >Description:
> Hi,
> 
> as a french ports committer my first contribution to docs naturally
> came as the translation of the contributing-ports article ;) 
> 
> As stated in http://www.freebsd.org/docproj/submitting.html I include
> the article hereafter but you may also find it here:
> 
> http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/doc/contributing-ports/article.sgml
> 
> The resulting html page is available at:
> 
> http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/doc/contributing-ports/article.html
> 
> This translation was reviewed by another French-speaking person but as
> it is my first contribution it may require extensive review from a doc
> committer and any feedback would be very welcome.
> 
> Regards,
> culot@
> 
> 
> begin 644 contributing-ports.tar.gz

tar.gz are difficult to deal with, just send directly the SGML with your
PR.

Anyway I'll look at it :)

-- 
Marc
